item.title: The 2026-2027 Season of Events - 05/01/2026 12:00am EDT to 09/08/2026 11:59pm EDT
item.description: Location : 30 S Washington St, Tiffin, OH 44883, USA Here it is, folks! There are still a couple of [...]
item.dc:creator: The Ritz Theatre
item.yodel:media_alt_text: The 2026-2027 Season of Events on May 1, 2026 in Tiffin, OH. Featured themes include season of events and Seasonal & Holiday.

item.title: Plant Swap - 06/04/2026 10:00am EDT to 06/09/2026 8:30pm EDT
item.description: Location : 14 N Main St, Attica, OH 44807, USA Community Plant Swap at the Library Calling all plant lovers, gardeners, and curious beginners! Join us for our upcoming Plant Swap at the library—a fun and welcoming way to share the joy of growing. June 4 – June 9; During regular library hours. Trade plants, cuttings, and seeds with fellow community members. No need to bring anything to participate. All ages welcome! If you plan to contribute, you’re welcome to bring your plants or seeds anytime during the event dates—earlier in the week means more people can browse and enjoy them! Seeds should be in an envelope or Ziploc bag. Cuttings should be in a container that can go home with the plant. And don’t forget to label everything clearly so fellow gardeners know what they’re taking home! No registration required—just stop by and dig in!
item.dc:creator: Seneca East Public Library
item.yodel:media_alt_text: Plant Swap on Jun 4, 2026 in Attica, OH. Featured themes include plant swap and plants seeds cuttings.

item.title: Celebrate Recovery Bible Study - 06/08/2026 6:00pm EDT to 06/08/2026 7:00pm EDT
item.description: Location : 339 Sandusky St, Fostoria, OH 44830, USA Join us for Celebrate Recovery Bible Study Monday nights at 6pm. A group for everyone, as we deal with the hurts, hang ups, and habits in life. Bring your family, friends, and neighbors. A time of Bible Study, sharing life, and fellowship. No childcare is provided.
item.dc:creator: Fostoria Church of the Nazarene
item.yodel:media_alt_text: Celebrate Recovery Bible Study on Jun 8, 2026 in Fostoria, OH. Featured themes include celebrate recovery and family friends neighbors.

item.title: Container Gardening Workshop - 06/08/2026 6:30pm EDT to 06/08/2026 7:30pm EDT
item.description: Location : 14 N Main St, Attica, OH 44807, USA Join the Seneca County Master Gardener Volunteers to learn all about container gardening. We will be focusing on houseplants and annuals while still explaining the basics of raised beds and outdoor containers. Participants will learn how to choose their plants, choose the soil and then pot their plants. In addition to the education component of this program, participants will get their hands dirty by creating their own container garden to take home. This program is free to participants but registration is required. To register, please contact the Seneca East Public Library at (419) 426-3825.
item.dc:creator: Seneca County Master Gardener Association
item.yodel:media_alt_text: Container Gardening Workshop on Jun 8, 2026 in Attica, OH. Featured themes include raised beds and Classes/Workshops.

item.title: Master Gardeners - 06/08/2026 6:30pm EDT to 06/08/2026 7:30pm EDT
item.description: Location : 14 N Main St, Attica, OH 44807, USA Registration required. Registration will open two weeks prior to the event. Sign up at the library or by calling 419-426-3825.
item.dc:creator: Seneca East Public Library
item.yodel:media_alt_text: Master Gardeners on Jun 8, 2026 in Attica, OH. Featured themes include master gardeners and registration required.

item.title: Tammy Training - 4 Disciplines of Execution - 06/09/2026 8:30am EDT to 06/09/2026 3:00pm EDT
item.description: Location : 928 W Market St, Tiffin, OH 44883, USA null
item.dc:creator: Carey Exempted Village Schools
item.yodel:media_alt_text: Tammy Training - 4 Disciplines of Execution on Jun 9, 2026 in Tiffin, OH. Featured themes include tammy training and disciplines of execution.

item.title: Building Brain Healthy Habits - 06/09/2026 10:00am EDT to 06/09/2026 11:00am EDT
item.description: Location : 28 Hopewell Ave, Tiffin, OH 44883, USA Learn about healthy habits for your brain.
item.dc:creator: Allen Eiry Center
item.yodel:media_alt_text: Building Brain Healthy Habits on Jun 9, 2026 in Tiffin, OH. Featured themes include tiffin, ohio and Health & Fitness.

item.title: NextGen Technology Camp - 06/09/2026 10:30am EDT to 06/11/2026 3:30pm EDT
item.description: Location : 194 Clay St, Tiffin, OH 44883, USA NextGen Tech Camp is an immersive, hands-on summer experience designed for students entering their sophomore or junior year who want to explore cutting-edge technology in a dynamic and engaging environment. Hosted by Tiffin University, this camp provides a glimpse into the innovative technology programs and opportunities available at TU, preparing students for exciting careers in cybersecurity, computer science, robotics, artificial intelligence, and more. Campers will engage in a variety of hands-on activities, including drone flight and aerial technology, where they will learn real-world applications of unmanned aerial systems. They will also explore cybersecurity and ethical hacking, diving into digital defense strategies and learning how to protect against cyber threats. Artificial intelligence and robotics will be a major focus, allowing students to interact with Spot, the Boston Dynamics robot dog, while also gaining practical hardware skills through soldering and electronics practice kits. To add to the excitement, campers will compete in Esports gaming and participate in tech challenges and team competitions, where they will collaborate and apply their newly learned skills in fun and engaging ways. These experiences will balance structured learning and interactive problem-solving, ensuring students stay engaged throughout the program. All activities, including drone flight, robotics, and soldering, will be conducted under the supervision of experienced instructors in a safe, controlled environment. Campers will receive proper guidance, use protective equipment where necessary, and follow strict safety protocols at all times to ensure a secure learning experience. In addition to hands-on learning, campers will gain insight into the technology programs at Tiffin University, helping them explore future academic and career opportunities in cybersecurity, computer science, AI, robotics, and drone technology. Campers will also have an exclusive opportunity to fly a drone, interact with Spot the Robot Dog, and experience firsthand what it’s like to be part of Tiffin University’s technology-driven learning environment. Come experience the future of technology at Tiffin University—where innovation meets opportunity.
item.dc:creator: Tiffin University
item.yodel:media_alt_text: NextGen Technology Camp on Jun 9, 2026 in Tiffin, OH. Featured themes include sophomore junior year and tiffin, ohio.

item.title: Family Storytime - 06/09/2026 10:30am EDT to 06/09/2026 11:30am EDT
item.description: Location : 77 Jefferson St, Tiffin, OH 44883, USA The Youth Services Department at the Tiffin-Seneca Public Library will offer “Family Storytime” on Tuesdays, June 2, 9, 16, 23, and 30 at 10:30 a.m. in the Frost Kalnow Room. “Family Storytime” features stories, songs, rhymes, games, and more for the entire family. All ages are welcome and registration is not required. This program is part of the 2026 Summer Reading Program, “Unearth a Story.” For more information, stop by the Junior Library, call 419-447-3751, or log on to http://www.tiffinsenecalibrary.org/
item.dc:creator: Tiffin-Seneca Public Library
item.yodel:media_alt_text: Family Storytime on Jun 9, 2026 in Tiffin, OH. Featured themes include summer reading program and tiffin, ohio.

item.title: Seneca County Human Resources Association | - 06/09/2026 11:45am EDT to 06/09/2026 1:00pm EDT
item.description: Location : 45 St Lawrence Dr, Tiffin, OH 44883, USA Join the Seneca County Human Resources Association on Tuesday, June 9, 2026, from 11:45 a.m. to 1:00 p.m. in the McMullen Conference Room at Mercy Health – Tiffin Hospital. Eastman & Smith Ltd. will return to provide a mid-year legal update, reviewing recent legislative and regulatory developments and offering practical strategies to help HR professionals navigate evolving workplace requirements. The Seneca County Human Resources Association (SCHRA) connects HR professionals, business leaders, and organizational managers across Seneca County to share best practices, discuss workforce trends, and grow professionally. Meetings focus on practical learning, peer discussion, and updates on programs and resources that support hiring, engagement, compliance, and organizational success. Membership in the Seneca County Human Resources Association (SCHRA) is open to anyone with HR responsibilities or an interest in workforce and personnel development. SCHRA operates on a one-time yearly registration, allowing members to sign up once for the entire year rather than registering for each individual meeting. Registered members receive meeting notices, speaker details, and calendar invitations for every upcoming session throughout the year. To register for SCHRA visit: https://www.developsenecacounty.org/schra-interest-form/
item.dc:creator: Seneca Regional Chamber & Development
item.yodel:media_alt_text: Seneca County Human Resources Association | on Jun 9, 2026 in Tiffin, OH. Featured themes include membership and professional development.

item.title: Grab And Go Lunches For Kids - 06/09/2026 12:00pm EDT to 06/09/2026 1:00pm EDT
item.description: Location : 339 Sandusky St, Fostoria, OH 44830, USA Grab And Go Lunches For Kids are each Tuesday in June and July 12pm-1pm, or until they run out, at FNC Hope Community Center.
item.dc:creator: Fostoria Church of the Nazarene
item.yodel:media_alt_text: Grab And Go Lunches For Kids on Jun 9, 2026 in Fostoria, OH. Featured themes include youth programs and Kids & Family.

item.title: Forensic Science Academy Camp - 06/09/2026 12:00pm EDT to 06/09/2026 12:00pm EDT
item.description: Location : 194 Clay St, Tiffin, OH 44883, USA If Law and Order, CSI and NCIS are on regular rotation and science has become a guilty pleasure, it is time to take it to the next level with Tiffin University Forensic Science Academy Camp. Especially for high school students entering junior and senior year, campers will learn principles and tactics to assist criminal investigations through chemistry, biology, and analyzing real and recent crime scenes from coroners across the country. Campers will work in small groups with high-level TU professors with field experience alongside experts currently working in the fields of crime scene analysis, fire forensics, blood spatter, ballistics, escape rooms, decomposition, forensic biology and forensic chemistry. Campers will witness a real autopsy- in person! Campers will also learn how to handle the mental and emotional challenges of this kind of career from current and past Death Investigators and Coroners. For entering sophomores and juniors Cost $979/camper
item.dc:creator: Tiffin University
item.yodel:media_alt_text: Forensic Science Academy Camp on Jun 9, 2026 in Tiffin, OH. Featured themes include high school students and junior and senior year.

item.title: Tiffin's Wild Goose Chase - 06/09/2026 1:00pm EDT to 06/09/2026 4:00pm EDT
item.description: Location : 107 E Perry St, Tiffin, OH 44883, USA Tiffin’s Wild Goose Chase All Summer Long MEMORIAL DAY THRU LABOR DAY Location: The City of Tiffin Get ready for a summer full of fun with Tiffin’s Wild Goose Chase, brought to you by Simply Shop Local! Spend the summer exploring Tiffin as you search for porch geese at participating local businesses throughout the city. Each stop is a chance to discover new places, support local, and enjoy a unique, interactive experience with friends and family. How It Works: 1. Pick up a paper passport at any participating business OR 2. Get your online pass here https://www.simplyshoplocal.org/blank/summer-1 • Visit participating businesses around Tiffin • Find the porch goose at each location • Locate & record the 4 digit code for each goose. • Explore, shop, and enjoy the journey all summer long Whether you’re competing to find them all or just enjoying the adventure, the Wild Goose Chase is the perfect way to experience everything Tiffin has to offer. Local Businesses: Want to be part of the fun? Message us or tag a business that should join the chase! https://forms.gle/w9RFF2Hy6xC51W657
item.dc:creator: Steinmetz Signs & Graphic Ink (SSG Ink - Shortened)
item.yodel:media_alt_text: Tiffin's Wild Goose Chase on Jun 9, 2026 in Tiffin, OH. Featured themes include Seasonal & Holiday and interactive adventure.

item.title: Teen Tuesday: Summer Edition! - 06/09/2026 2:00pm EDT to 06/09/2026 3:30pm EDT
item.description: Location : 77 Jefferson St, Tiffin, OH 44883, USA Tiffin-Seneca Public Library will offer a special summer edition of “Teen Tuesday” on Tuesdays, June 2, 9, 16, 23, and 30 from 2:00 p.m. to 3:30 p.m. in the Frost Kalnow Room. Teens entering grades 6 through 12 are invited to a weekly hangout featuring games, snacks, crafts and more. Part of the 2026 Summer Reading Program “Unearth a Story.” For more information, log onto http://www.tiffinsenecalibrary.org/ or call the library at 419-447-3751.
item.dc:creator: Tiffin-Seneca Public Library
item.yodel:media_alt_text: Teen Tuesday: Summer Edition! on Jun 9, 2026 in Tiffin, OH. Featured themes include teen tuesday and tiffin, ohio.

item.description: Location : 339 Sandusky St, Fostoria, OH 44830, USA Free Community Dinner 2nd & 4th Tuesday Each Month June 9th & 23rd 6pm-7pm FNC Hope Community Center 339 Sandusky Street, Fostoria, Ohio
item.dc:creator: Fostoria Church of the Nazarene
item.yodel:media_alt_text: Free Community Dinner on Jun 9, 2026 in Fostoria, OH. Featured themes include free and Food & Drink.

item.title: Rubber Ducky Wednesday - 06/10/2026 11:00am EDT to 06/10/2026 12:00pm EDT
item.description: Location : 77 Jefferson St, Tiffin, OH 44883, USA The Youth Services Department at the Tiffin-Seneca Public Library will host “Rubber Ducky Wednesday” on Wednesdays, June 3, 10, 17, and 24 at 11:00 a.m. in the Frost Kalnow Room. Babies age birth to 35 months and their caregivers are invited to a story time on June 3, June 10, and June 17 with books, songs and lap bounces. On June 24, join the Library for a play date with toys and books for the babies to enjoy together. This program is part of the 2026 Summer Reading Program, “Unearth a Story.” For more information, stop by the Junior Library, call 419-447-3751, or log on to http://www.tiffinsenecalibrary.org/
item.dc:creator: Tiffin-Seneca Public Library
item.yodel:media_alt_text: Rubber Ducky Wednesday on Jun 10, 2026 in Tiffin, OH. Featured themes include story time and summer reading program.

item.title: Squish Needs a House! Paint Workshop (1) - 06/10/2026 12:30pm EDT to 06/10/2026 2:00pm EDT
item.description: Location : 113 Melmore St, Tiffin, OH 44883, USA Join us for the "Squish Needs a House! Paint Workshop," designed for elementary-aged kids who love creativity and fun! At this engaging workshop, participants will receive a mystery Squishville critter along with a wooden house and accessories to decorate. Unleash your inner interior designer as you paint and personalize your unique Squishville home! Come to the RF&B studio for a wonderful day of artistic expression and play!
item.dc:creator: Rustic Flair & Brush
item.yodel:media_alt_text: Squish Needs a House! Paint Workshop (1) on Jun 10, 2026 in Tiffin, OH. Featured themes include squish needs a house paint workshop and Classes/Workshops.

item.title: Tiffin's Wild Goose Chase - 06/10/2026 1:00pm EDT to 06/10/2026 4:00pm EDT
item.description: Location : 47 Clay St, Tiffin, OH 44883, USA Tiffin’s Wild Goose Chase All Summer Long MEMORIAL DAY THRU LABOR DAY Location: The City of Tiffin Get ready for a summer full of fun with Tiffin’s Wild Goose Chase, brought to you by Simply Shop Local! Spend the summer exploring Tiffin as you search for porch geese at participating local businesses throughout the city. Pick up a paper passport at any participating business OR 2. Get your online pass here https://www.simplyshoplocal.org/blank/summer-1 • Visit participating businesses around Tiffin • Find the porch goose at each location • Locate & record the 4 digit code for each goose. • Explore, shop, and enjoy the journey all summer long Whether you’re competing to find them all or just enjoying the adventure, the Wild Goose Chase is the perfect way to experience everything Tiffin has to offer. item.title: Race to Escape: Robbery at the Museum - 06/10/2026 2:00pm EDT to 06/10/2026 4:00pm EDT
item.description: Location : 77 Jefferson St, Tiffin, OH 44883, USA Tiffin-Seneca Public Library will host “Race to Escape: Robbery at the Museum” for teens entering grades six through twelve on Wednesday, June 10 from 2:00 to 4:00 p.m. in the Frost Kalnow Room. Work together to crack the case in this interactive museum mystery adventure. Teams will search for clues, solve puzzles, unlock hidden rooms, and compete to see who can uncover the robber and escape first. Registration is required by calling 419-447-3751 or visiting the online calendar at http://www.tiffinsenecalibrary.org/ This program is part of the 2026 Summer Reading Program, “Unearth a Story.” For more information, call 419-447-3751 or log on to http://www.tiffinsenecalibrary.org/
item.dc:creator: Tiffin-Seneca Public Library
item.yodel:media_alt_text: Race to Escape: Robbery at the Museum on Jun 10, 2026 in Tiffin, OH. Featured themes include escape room and interactive museum mystery.

item.title: BUCC's Beer, Burgers & Bibles (Monthly Bible Study) - 06/10/2026 6:00pm EDT to 06/10/2026 8:00pm EDT
item.description: Location : 33 N Marion St, Bloomville, OH 44818, USA Join us as we take a deep dive on small sections of the bible for our monthly bible study. Location and menu vary month to month. Call or text Audrey at 419-561-0244 if you'd like to join us! We have a very casual, fun, "no stupid questions" atmosphere. It's not hard to jump in - you don't need to have joined a previously. Come and go as you please!
item.dc:creator: Bloomville UCC
item.yodel:media_alt_text: BUCC's Beer, Burgers & Bibles (Monthly Bible Study) on Jun 10, 2026 in Bloomville, OH. Featured themes include casual atmosphere and join us.

item.title: WEW at the Franciscan Earth Literacy Center - 06/10/2026 6:00pm EDT to 06/10/2026 7:30pm EDT
item.description: Location : Seneca County, OH, USA Come join WEW at the Franciscan Earth Literacy Center for an upcycled craft! No childcare is provided for this meeting. Sorry Must RSVP to shallett@ncoesc.org or on FB.
item.dc:creator: Women Empowering Women - Seneca Co.
item.yodel:media_alt_text: WEW at the Franciscan Earth Literacy Center on Jun 10, 2026 in Seneca County, OH, USA. Featured themes include franciscan earth literacy center and no childcare.

item.title: Bible Study in Acts - 06/10/2026 6:00pm EDT to 06/10/2026 7:00pm EDT
item.description: Location : 339 Sandusky St, Fostoria, OH 44830, USA Join us at 6pm Wednesday Nights for Bible Study through the book of Acts. Everyone is welcome. Childcare is not provided. Contact us with any questions.
item.dc:creator: Fostoria Church of the Nazarene
item.yodel:media_alt_text: Bible Study in Acts on Jun 10, 2026 in Fostoria, OH. Featured themes include fostoria, ohio and Religious.

item.title: "Barn and Yellow Flowers" Thursday, June 11, 2026 9am-12pm or 6pm-9pm #06112601 or #06112602 - 06/11/2026 9:00am EDT to 06/11/2026 9:00pm EDT
item.description: Location : 130 S Washington St, Tiffin, OH 44883, USA Pre-registration and payment is required by Friday, June 5. Paint "Barn and Yellow Flowers" in water mixable oils with Carol Hoffman on Thursday, June 11 from 9am until 12 pm or from 6pm-9pm. Please arrive at least 15 minutes before class time. Carol will guide you through the process of creating this painting whether you are a beginner or more advanced painter. All of the materials including the 11"x14" canvas are included in the price of the class. Minimum class size 3 people, maximum of 8. Please bring a large box to take your painting home in. Cost is $50 for TAG members & $60 for non-members. Call Carol with questions. 419 624 7020, Tiffin Art Guild at 419-443-0478 (tiffinartguild@att.net), or stop in at the Gallery, 130 S Washington St, Tiffin between Noon and 4 pm Wednesday thru Saturday
item.dc:creator: Tiffin Art Guild
item.yodel:media_alt_text: "Barn and Yellow Flowers" Thursday, June 11, 2026 9am-12pm or 6pm-9pm #06112601 or #06112602 on Jun 11, 2026 in Tiffin, OH. Featured themes include Classes/Workshops and Arts.

item.title: 2026 Chamber Challenge Golf Outing | Day 1 - 06/11/2026 11:00am EDT to 06/11/2026 5:00pm EDT
item.description: Location : 4399 OH-231, Tiffin, OH 44883, USA Get ready for the 2026 Chamber Challenge Golf Scramble on Thursday, June 11 and Friday, June 12 at Mohawk Golf and Country Club! We will have a PM flight tee off at 12 PM on Thursday, June 11 and a AM flight tee off at 8 AM on Friday, June 12. This year's outing will feature the annual scramble tournament, chipping and putting contest, and proxy prizes throughout the day. Register your team at: https://senecaregionalchamberofcommerceoh.growthzoneapp.com/ap/Events/Register/b3FDjb6TNCRCw
item.dc:creator: Seneca Regional Chamber & Development
item.yodel:media_alt_text: 2026 Chamber Challenge Golf Outing | Day 1 on Jun 11, 2026 in Tiffin, OH. Featured themes include tiffin, ohio and Sports, Adult.

item.title: Tiffin's Wild Goose Chase - 06/11/2026 1:00pm EDT to 06/11/2026 4:00pm EDT
item.description: Location : 107 E Perry St, Tiffin, OH 44883, USA Tiffin’s Wild Goose Chase All Summer Long MEMORIAL DAY THRU LABOR DAY Location: The City of Tiffin Get ready for a summer full of fun with Tiffin’s Wild Goose Chase, brought to you by Simply Shop Local! Spend the summer exploring Tiffin as you search for porch geese at participating local businesses throughout the city. Each stop is a chance to discover new places, support local, and enjoy a unique, interactive experience with friends and family. How It Works: 1. Pick up a paper passport at any participating business OR 2. Get your online pass here https://www.simplyshoplocal.org/blank/summer-1 • Visit participating businesses around Tiffin • Find the porch goose at each location • Locate & record the 4 digit code for each goose. • Explore, shop, and enjoy the journey all summer long Whether you’re competing to find them all or just enjoying the adventure, the Wild Goose Chase is the perfect way to experience everything Tiffin has to offer. Local Businesses: Want to be part of the fun? Message us or tag a business that should join the chase! https://forms.gle/w9RFF2Hy6xC51W657
item.dc:creator: Steinmetz Signs & Graphic Ink (SSG Ink - Shortened)
item.yodel:media_alt_text: Tiffin's Wild Goose Chase on Jun 11, 2026 in Tiffin, OH. Featured themes include tiffin's wild goose chase and Seasonal & Holiday.

item.yodel:media_alt_text: Tiffin's Wild Goose Chase on Jun 11, 2026 in Tiffin, OH. Featured themes include tiffin wild goose chase and tiffin's wild goose chase.

item.title: Teen Art Club - 06/11/2026 2:00pm EDT to 06/11/2026 3:30pm EDT
item.description: Location : 77 Jefferson St, Tiffin, OH 44883, USA The Teen Department at the Tiffin-Seneca Public library will host “Teen Art Club” on Thursdays, June 11 and 25 from 2:00 to 3:30 p.m. in the Junior Home Room. Teens in grades 6 through 12 are invited to get creative with other artsy teens. Teens are encouraged to bring their own drawings and projects or just drop by to explore a new project. The Library will provide craft supplies and the opportunity to learn new arts and crafts skills. Part of the 2026 Summer Reading Program “Unearth a Story.” For more information, log onto http://www.tiffinsenecalibrary.org/ or call the library at 419-447-3751.
item.dc:creator: Tiffin-Seneca Public Library
item.yodel:media_alt_text: Teen Art Club on Jun 11, 2026 in Tiffin, OH. Featured themes include teens and tiffin, ohio.

item.title: Dino Training Camp - 06/11/2026 2:00pm EDT to 06/11/2026 3:00pm EDT
item.description: Location : 77 Jefferson St, Tiffin, OH 44883, USA Join the Tiffin-Seneca Public Library's Youth Services Department for "Dino Training Camp" on Thursday, June 11, from 2:00 to 4:00 p.m. in the Frost Kalnow Room. This engaging event invites preschool-aged children and older to unleash their inner dinosaurs through fun challenges, including rescuing a dinosaur egg and navigating tasks with T-Rex arms. Part of the 2026 Summer Reading Program themed “Unearth a Story,” this camp promises adventurous learning and play. For more information, visit the Junior Library, call 419-447-3751, or go to http://www.tiffinsenecalibrary.org/.
item.dc:creator: Tiffin-Seneca Public Library
item.yodel:media_alt_text: Dino Training Camp on Jun 11, 2026 in Tiffin, OH. Featured themes include adventurous learning and t-rex arms.

item.title: UWNCO Raise A Glass: Wyandot - 06/11/2026 4:00pm EDT to 06/11/2026 6:00pm EDT
item.description: Location : 300 E Findlay St, Carey, OH 43316, USA Join us in Wyandot County for Raise A Glass! We're celebrating our donors, friends, and supporters with a series of open house appreciation events across the region. Join us at Carey Brewing Station at 300 E Findlay St in Carey on Thursday, June 11 from 4 to 6 pm; your first drink is on us! 2026 Raise A Glass June 4 | Marion Brewing Co., Marion | 4 to 6 pm June 5 | Aglet Brewing, Tiffin | 4 to 6 pm June 10 | Cote Winery, Mt. Gilead | 4 to 6 pm June 11 | Carey Brewing Station, Carey | 4 to 6 pm June 12 | Pub House 123, Galion | 4 to 6 pm Our 2026 Raise A Glass series is sponsored by Alluvial Private Wealth in Marion; Seneca County Edward Jones - Financial Advisors Elaine Daugherty, Chris Lee, Hannah Smith, and Rachal Tate; and Edward Jones - Financial Advisors Dan Beach & Hilary Orians in Wyandot County.
item.dc:creator: United Way of North Central Ohio
item.yodel:media_alt_text: UWNCO Raise A Glass: Wyandot on Jun 11, 2026 in Carey, OH. Featured themes include breweries wineries and Food & Drink.

item.title: The Blueprint Series - June Happy Hour - 06/11/2026 4:30pm CDT to 06/11/2026 6:00pm CDT
item.description:
Location : 40 E Perry St, Tiffin, OH 44883, USA

Happy Hour with Financial Design: Keep More of What You Earn

Join us on June 11th from 4:30–6:00 PM for a casual happy hour focused on tax-smart financial planning strategies for working professionals, retirees, and business owners.

We'll discuss:

-The impact of tax drag on investment accounts

-Whether you're saving in the right tax buckets

-Building a tax-smart financial blueprint

-Retirement planning opportunities for self-employed individuals

Enjoy refreshments, connect with others, and gain practical insights to help you keep more of what you earn.
item.dc:creator: Financial Design Investments & Insurance
item.yodel:media_alt_text: The Blueprint Series - June Happy Hour on Jun 11, 2026 in Tiffin, OH. Featured themes include Business and retirement planning, financial planning, tax planning, professionals, retirees, business owners.

item.title: The Blueprint Series - June Happy Hour - 06/11/2026 4:30pm EDT to 06/11/2026 5:30pm EDT
item.description: Location : 40 E Perry St, Tiffin, OH 44883, USA Happy Hour with Financial Design: Keep More of What You Earn Join us on June 11th from 4:30–6:00 PM for a casual happy hour focused on tax-smart financial planning strategies for working professionals, retirees, and business owners. We'll discuss: -The impact of tax drag on investment accounts -Whether you're saving in the right tax buckets -Building a tax-smart financial blueprint -Retirement planning opportunities for self-employed individuals Enjoy refreshments, connect with others, and gain practical insights to help you keep more of what you earn.
item.dc:creator: Financial Design Agency of Ohio
item.yodel:media_alt_text: The Blueprint Series - June Happy Hour on Jun 11, 2026 in Tiffin, OH. Featured themes include working professionals and the blueprint series - june happy hour.

item.title: Downtown Trivia Night at The Barn at Seneca Hills - 06/11/2026 7:00pm EDT to 06/11/2026 8:30pm EDT
item.description: Location : 4044 W Township Rd 98, Tiffin, OH 44883, USA Groups of all ages are invited to compete in two rounds of general trivia questions plus the final questions of local interest. Answers will be judged by local celebrities. Participants are asked to form teams of 6 or fewer, which can be composed of all ages. Teams will write their answers to be judged by local celebrities. Questions will be geared toward ages 12 and up. No phones, tablets, or electronic devices may be accessed during the contest. A traveling trophy will be awarded to the winning team. **ONE GrowthZone ticket per team. List each of the team members on the ticket.
item.dc:creator: Downtown Tiffin
item.yodel:media_alt_text: Downtown Trivia Night at The Barn at Seneca Hills on Jun 11, 2026 in Tiffin, OH. Featured themes include teams and trivia night.

item.title: 2026 Chamber Challenge Golf Outing | Day 2 - 06/12/2026 7:00am EDT to 06/12/2026 1:00pm EDT
item.description: Location : 4399 OH-231, Tiffin, OH 44883, USA Get ready for the 2026 Chamber Challenge Golf Scramble on Thursday, June 11 and Friday, June 12 at Mohawk Golf and Country Club! We will have a PM flight tee off at 12 PM on Thursday, June 11 and a AM flight tee off at 8AM on Friday, June 12. This year's outing will feature the annual scramble tournament, chipping and putting contest, and proxy prizes throughout the day. Register your team at: https://senecaregionalchamberofcommerceoh.growthzoneapp.com/ap/Events/Register/b3FDjb6TNCRCw
item.dc:creator: Seneca Regional Chamber & Development
item.yodel:media_alt_text: 2026 Chamber Challenge Golf Outing | Day 2 on Jun 12, 2026 in Tiffin, OH. Featured themes include scramble tournament and tiffin, ohio.

item.title: Smokin' Sows Food Truck - 06/12/2026 10:00am EDT to 06/12/2026 2:00pm EDT
item.description: Location : 182 St Francis Ave, Tiffin, OH 44883, USA Smokin's Sows Food Truck in the front parking lot of St. Francis Home Friday, June 12 from 10am - 2pm
item.dc:creator: St. Francis Senior Ministries
